companies.name: Zappos Theater At Planet Hollywood Resort & Casino, Las Vegas

title: The Woman In Me
notes:
Tracks 2-1 to 2-5: Live from Las Vegas.

"Disc made in Mexico" stickered on shrink wrap near the barcode.
